hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易；【FINANCE】这位银行首席执行官让他的人工智能克隆人处理财报电话会议——现在他正在签署一项 OpenAI 协议；【WORLD】以色列和真主党在黎巴嫩进行贸易打击，伊朗谈判仍处于搁置状态。

items.title: This little-known ETF is up over 600% amid U.S.-Iran war, a better trade than oil or energy stocks
items.summary: The Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) has surged more than 600% since the beginning of the year, vastly outperforming crude oil and energy stocks.
items.title_zh: 这只鲜为人知的ETF在美伊战争期间上涨了600%以上，比石油或能源股更好的交易
items.summary_zh: 自今年年初以来，Breakwave Tanker Shipping ETF (BWET) 已飙升逾 600%，远远优于原油和能源股。

items.title: This bank CEO let his AI clone handle an earnings call — now he's signing an OpenAI deal
items.summary: It's part of Customers Bank CEO Sam Sidhu's effort to get ahead in the industry's race to transform itself using AI agents as a new digital workforce
items.title_zh: 这位银行首席执行官让他的人工智能克隆人处理财报电话会议——现在他正在签署一项 OpenAI 协议
items.summary_zh: 这是 Customers Bank 首席执行官 Sam Sidhu 努力的一部分，目的是利用人工智能代理作为新的数字劳动力，在行业转型竞赛中取得领先

items.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
items.summary: Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.
items.title_zh: 以色列和真主党在黎巴嫩进行贸易打击，伊朗谈判仍处于搁置状态
items.summary_zh: 黎巴嫩和伊朗的停火基础不稳定，军事袭击不断爆发，华盛顿和德黑兰之间结束战争的直接谈判陷入僵局。

items.title: Global interest rates, Robinhood, Galaxy earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
items.summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 27.
items.title_zh: 全球利率、Robinhood、Galaxy 收益：加密货币周展望
items.summary_zh: 看看从 4 月 27 日开始的一周将会发生什么。

items.title: Bitcoin funds take in $933 million as crypto ETFs hit highest AUM since February
items.summary: Total assets under management across crypto funds rose to $155 billion, the highest level since February 1, though still well below the $263 billion peak from October 2025.
items.title_zh: 加密 ETF 资产规模创 2 月份以来最高，比特币基金吸纳 9.33 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 加密货币基金管理的总资产升至 1550 亿美元，为 2 月 1 日以来的最高水平，但仍远低于 2025 年 10 月以来的 2630 亿美元峰值。

items.title: Bitcoin reverses from $79,500 as oil surge triggers broader crypto selloff
items.summary: BTC fails at $80,000 and drops 2% as rising oil prices weigh on sentiment with altcoins leading losses across a volatile session.
items.title_zh: 由于石油价格上涨引发更广泛的加密货币抛售，比特币从 79,500 美元逆转
items.summary_zh: 由于油价上涨打压市场情绪，比特币跌至 80,000 美元，跌幅达 2%，而山寨币在波动的交易日中领跌。

items.title: ‘The beat goes on’: Michael Saylor’s Strategy adds 3,273 bitcoin for $255 million as holdings reach 818,334 BTC
items.summary: Strategy's holdings account for 3.9% of the total 21 million bitcoin supply — worth around $63.7 billion.
items.title_zh: “节奏仍在继续”：Michael Saylor 的策略以 2.55 亿美元增持 3,273 枚比特币，持有量达到 818,334 BTC
items.summary_zh: Strategy 持有的比特币占 2100 万枚比特币总供应量的 3.9%，价值约 637 亿美元。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Bessent defends U.S. dollar swap lines as Iran war harms global finances
items.summary: President Donald Trump, asked on CNBC's "Squawk Box" this week about a possible UAE swap line, appeared to say he is in favor of it.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争损害全球金融，贝森特捍卫美元互换额度
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统本周在 CNBC 的“Squawk Box”节目中被问及可能的阿联酋互换额度时，似乎表示他赞成这一做法。

items.title: Nuclear reactor company X-energy shares surge 27% as AI drives interest in its IPO
items.summary: Advanced nuclear reactor company X-energy began trading Friday as the AI boom and electrification broadly spark a flurry of interest in the nuclear industry.
items.title_zh: 核反应堆公司 X-energy 股价飙升 27%，人工智能推动其 IPO 兴趣
items.summary_zh: 随着人工智能热潮和电气化广泛引发人们对核工业的浓厚兴趣，先进核反应堆公司 X-energy 于周五开始交易。

items.title: Bettors on Kalshi now see Warsh likely confirmed by mid-May after DOJ drops Powell probe
items.summary: Bettors on the platform now see an 86% chance that Warsh's nomination is confirmed by the U.S. Senate by May 15.
items.title_zh: 在司法部撤销鲍威尔调查后，卡尔希的投注者现在认为沃什可能会在五月中旬得到确认
items.summary_zh: 该平台上的投注者现在认为，沃什的提名在 5 月 15 日之前获得美国参议院批准的可能性为 86%。

items.title: The aerospace and defense trade is taking investors deeper into space, and more ETFs are up for the mission
items.summary: VettaFi's Cinthia Murphy finds more exchange-traded funds are tackling the space theme more directly as excitement over the SpaceX IPO grows.
items.title_zh: 航空航天和国防贸易正在将投资者带入更深入的太空，更多的 ETF 正准备迎接这一使命
items.summary_zh: VettaFi 的辛西娅·墨菲 (Cinthia Murphy) 发现，随着 SpaceX 首次公开募股 (IPO) 的热情日益高涨，越来越多的交易所交易基金正在更直接地探讨太空主题。

items.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani knocked Ken Griffin in pied-a-terre tax promo. His firm calls the move 'shameful'
items.summary: Chief Operating Officer Gerald Beeson saying in a memo that targeting Griffin showed "ignorance and disdain" toward contributors to the city's economy.
items.title_zh: 纽约市市长马姆达尼在临时税收促销活动中击败了肯·格里芬。他的公司称此举“可耻”
items.summary_zh: 首席运营官杰拉尔德·比森(Gerald Beeson)在一份备忘录中表示，针对格里芬表现出对该市经济贡献者的“无知和蔑视”。

items.title: Traders are betting on big moves in Intel on earnings
items.summary: Semiconductor stocks are powering the U.S. equity market to records and traders are predicting that means a big swing in shares of Intel after earnings tonight.
items.title_zh: 交易员押注英特尔盈利的重大变动
items.summary_zh: 半导体股正在推动美国股市创下历史新高，交易员预测这意味着今晚公布财报后英特尔股价将出现大幅波动。

items.title: Colombia offers record $1.4m-reward for rebel it blames for deadly bomb attack
items.summary: Officials say a rebel leader known as "Marlon" ordered the attack in which 20 people were killed.
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚悬赏创纪录的 140 万美元悬赏叛军，追究造成致命炸弹袭击的叛乱分子
items.summary_zh: 官员称，一名名叫“马龙”的叛军领导人下令发动这次袭击，造成 20 人死亡。

items.title: Archbishop praises Pope's anti-war comments during Vatican visit
items.summary: Dame Sarah Mullally, the first female head of the Church of England, had a private discussion with Pope Leo during the trip.
items.title_zh: 大主教赞扬教宗访问梵蒂冈期间的反战言论
items.summary_zh: 英国国教第一位女领袖莎拉·穆拉利夫人在访问期间与教皇利奥进行了私人讨论。

items.title: Kim Jong Un opens memorial for N Korean soldiers killed in Ukraine war
items.summary: Kim Jong Un and Russian Defence Minister Andrey Belousov unveiled the memorial in Pyongyang.

items.summary_zh: 金正恩和俄罗斯国防部长安德烈·别洛乌索夫在平壤为纪念碑揭幕。

items.title: Pirates seize another vessel off Somali coast as threat level increased

items.summary_zh: 英国海事监测机构报告称，过去一周在索马里沿海至少发生了四起疑似海盗事件。

items.title: Fighting ‘Sacred’ War in Ukraine, North Korea and Russia Pledge to Deepen Ties
items.summary: The two countries discussed long-term military cooperation, as they opened a memorial for North Korean troops killed in Russia’s war in Ukraine.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰、朝鲜和俄罗斯的“神圣”战争承诺深化关系
items.summary_zh: 两国讨论了长期军事合作，并为在俄罗斯乌克兰战争中阵亡的朝鲜士兵开设了纪念碑。

items.title: Mali’s Defense Minister Killed in Attacks by Islamist Insurgents
items.summary: The death of the minister, Gen. Sadio Camara, a central figure in the country’s military government, comes amid escalating violence in the region.
items.title_zh: 马里国防部长在伊斯兰叛乱分子袭击中丧生
items.summary_zh: 该国军政府核心人物、部长萨迪奥·卡马拉将军去世之际，该地区暴力事件不断升级。

items.title: Homeowners Fight for Control of Their Community in China
items.summary: They signed petitions, organized rallies and held strategy sessions over karaoke, debating how far to push the authorities in their dispute with a developer.

items.summary_zh: 他们签署请愿书，组织集会，并在卡拉 OK 中召开战略会议，讨论在与开发商的纠纷中将当局推向何种程度。

items.title: Iran and U.S. Sink Into Awkward Limbo of ‘No War, No Peace’
items.summary: Each side is betting it can last longer than the other, analysts say. But there are risks in a stalemate without a deal.
items.title_zh: 伊朗和美国陷入“没有战争就没有和平”的尴尬困境
items.summary_zh: 分析人士称，双方都押注它能比对方持续更长时间。但没有达成协议的僵局也存在风险。

items.title: Upbit partner KBank to test onchain cross-border remittances with Ripple
items.summary: KBank and Ripple have already completed the first phase of the PoC, in which they verified a wallet app-based remittance system.

items.summary_zh: KBank 和 Ripple 已经完成了 PoC 的第一阶段，验证了基于钱包应用程序的汇款系统。

items.title: Skilled Polymarket traders are a 3% minority, and everyone else funds their gains: study
items.summary: A working paper analyzing every Polymarket trade between 2023 and 2025, finds that about 3% of accounts generate the bulk of price discovery.
items.title_zh: 熟练的 Polymarket 交易员只占 3% 的少数，其他人都为自己的收益提供资金：研究
items.summary_zh: 一份工作论文分析了 2023 年至 2025 年间的每笔 Polymarket 交易，发现大约 3% 的账户产生了大部分价格发现。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.5，这是我们迄今为止最智能的模型，速度更快、功能更强大，专为跨工具编码、研究和数据分析等复杂任务而构建。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: A faster way to estimate AI power consumption
items.summary: The “EnergAIzer” method generates reliable results in seconds, enabling data center operators to efficiently allocate resources and reduce wasted energy.
items.title_zh: 更快地估算 AI 功耗的方法
items.summary_zh: “EnergAIzer”方法可在几秒钟内生成可靠的结果，使数据中心运营商能够有效地分配资源并减少能源浪费。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.summary_zh: 2026 年 4 月 27 日您需要了解的信息

items.title: A long-time developer wants to split Bitcoin blockchain and reassign Satoshi coins. The community is calling it a theft
items.summary: Paul Sztorc proposes a 2026 hard fork of Bitcoin called eCash, giving BTC holders equivalent tokens and adding Drivechains.
items.title_zh: 一位长期开发人员想要分割比特币区块链并重新分配中本聪硬币。社区称其为盗窃
items.summary_zh: Paul Sztorc 提议在 2026 年对比特币进行硬分叉，称为 eCash，为 BTC 持有者提供等值的代币并添加 Drivechains。

items.title_zh: 随着伊朗反弹触及 79,400 美元的卖家墙，比特币从 12 周高位回落

items.title: ‘Better than bailouts?’: Curve founder proposes market-based bad debt recovery model for DeFi lending amid KelpDAO fallout
items.summary: Curve founder Michael Egorov proposed a new way to recover bad debt in DeFi lending markets amid industry debates on the KelpDAO incident.
items.title_zh: “比救助更好？”：Curve 创始人在 KelpDAO 的影响下提出基于市场的 DeFi 贷款坏账回收模型
items.summary_zh: 在业界对 KelpDAO 事件的争论中，Curve 创始人 Michael Egorov 提出了一种收回 DeFi 借贷市场坏账的新方法。

items.title: Bitcoin leads $1.2B weekly haul for global crypto funds as institutional demand builds: CoinShares
items.summary: Improving institutional demand spurred by bitcoin's multi-week high pushed $1.2 billion in weekly flows to crypto funds.
items.title_zh: 随着机构需求的增加，比特币引领全球加密基金每周 1.2 亿美元的收益：CoinShares

items.title: Western Union to launch stablecoin next month, with ‘Stable Card’ planned for global consumers
items.summary: WU is also launching a network connecting digital wallets to its existing retail infrastructure, and a stablecoin card for payments.

items.summary_zh: WU 还推出了一个将数字钱包连接到其现有零售基础设施的网络，以及用于支付的稳定币卡。

items.title: Bitcoin climbs above $79,000, Asian equities rise amid ‘subdued’ geopolitical tensions

items.title: MIT scientists build the world’s largest collection of Olympiad-level math problems, and open it to everyone
items.summary: New dataset of 30,000-plus competition math problems from 47 countries gives AI researchers a harder test — and students worldwide a better training ground.

items.summary_zh: 来自 47 个国家的 30,000 多个竞赛数学问题的新数据集为人工智能研究人员提供了更难的测试，也为世界各地的学生提供了更好的训练场。

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Foreign car companies bet on technology to hang onto once-lucrative China auto market
items.summary: U.S., Korean and German automakers announced a rush of new, tech-enabled cars at the Beijing Auto Show as they battle a sales slump
items.title_zh: 外国汽车公司押注技术以保住曾经利润丰厚的中国汽车市场
items.summary_zh: 美国、韩国和德国汽车制造商在北京车展上宣布推出大量新型科技汽车，以应对销量下滑

items.title: Risky meme trading is back. A trading rule change may have lit the fuse
items.summary: A regulatory shift is expected to remove barriers to rapid-fire trading and help revive a meme-stock frenzy.
items.title_zh: 高风险的模因交易又回来了。交易规则的改变可能点燃了导火索
items.summary_zh: 监管的转变预计将消除快速交易的障碍，并有助于重振迷因股票的狂热。

items.title: What we're learning about suspected Washington press dinner gunman
items.summary: The man arrested at the event attended by President Trump is due in court on Monday.
items.title_zh: 我们对华盛顿新闻晚宴疑似枪手的了解
items.summary_zh: 在特朗普总统出席的活动中被捕的男子将于周一出庭。

items.title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
items.summary: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称金在安全会谈后访问美国期间“非常安全”
items.summary_zh: 尽管一名枪手瞄准了总统参加的活动，但国事访问仍将继续进行。

items.title: At least 42 killed in Chad after water well dispute escalates
items.summary: The dispute was initially between two families before escalating into a cycle of reprisal attacks.
items.title_zh: 乍得水井纠纷升级 至少42人死亡
items.summary_zh: 争端最初发生在两个家庭之间，后来升级为报复性袭击的循环。

items.title: Michael Jackson biopic smashes box office record
items.summary: The film received poor reviews but has stormed the box office, taking $217m (£160m) globally.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·杰克逊传记片打破票房纪录
items.summary_zh: 该片评价不佳，但票房却突飞猛进，全球票房达到 2.17 亿美元（1.6 亿英镑）。

items.title: Oil prices rise as US-Iran peace talks stall
items.summary: President Trump said the US had cancelled plans to send a team to Pakistan for negotiations.
items.title_zh: 美伊和平谈判陷入僵局油价上涨
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，美国已取消派遣团队前往巴基斯坦进行谈判的计划。

items.title: French teen who licked vending machine straw faces jail in Singapore
items.summary: The teen, who posted on social media a video of himself licking the straw, could be jailed for more than two years.
items.title_zh: 法国青少年舔自动售货机吸管在新加坡面临牢狱之灾
items.summary_zh: 这名青少年在社交媒体上发布了自己舔吸管的视频，可能会被判处两年以上监禁。

items.title: Canada Says Its Gold Is Traceable and Clean. So We Traced It.
items.summary: We ended up in a Colombian mine controlled by a drug cartel.
items.title_zh: 加拿大称其黄金可追溯且清洁。所以我们追踪了它。
items.summary_zh: 我们最终来到了一个由贩毒集团控制的哥伦比亚矿井。

items.title: Can King Charles Help Heal the U.S.-British Rupture?
items.summary: Not since his mother, Queen Elizabeth II, traveled to Washington after the Suez Crisis has a visit by the British monarch come at such a fraught time in Anglo-American relations.
items.title_zh: 查尔斯国王能帮助弥合美英关系的破裂吗？
items.summary_zh: 自从他的母亲伊丽莎白二世女王在苏伊士危机后访问华盛顿以来，英国君主还没有在英美关系如此紧张的时刻访问华盛顿。

items.title: Israel’s President, Putting Off Decision on Pardon for Netanyahu, Will Push for Plea Deal
items.summary: President Isaac Herzog of Israel has decided not to issue a pardon to Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in his corruption case at this time, and instead will seek mediation, officials say.
items.title_zh: 以色列总统推迟赦免内塔尼亚胡的决定，将推动认罪协议
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，以色列总统艾萨克·赫尔佐格决定目前不对总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡的腐败案进行赦免，而是将寻求调解。

items.title: U.S. Mint Buys Drug Cartel Gold and Sells It as ‘American’
items.summary: As prices for the precious metal soar, the industry’s guardrails have broken down.
items.title_zh: 美国造币厂购买贩毒集团黄金并以“美国”名义出售
items.summary_zh: 随着贵金属价格飙升，该行业的护栏已经崩溃。

items.title: What Happened After The New York Times Found a Cartel Mine on a Colombian Military Base
items.summary: Officers denied that an illegal, large-scale gold operation was underway within earshot of their posts. But we had seen it with our own eyes.
items.title_zh: 《纽约时报》在哥伦比亚军事基地发现卡特尔地雷后发生了什么
items.summary_zh: 官员们否认在他们的哨所范围内正在进行非法的大规模黄金开采活动。但我们亲眼所见。

items.summary_zh: 欧盟指出，俄罗斯越来越依赖加密货币来规避制裁。

items.summary: April is almost over. May is the month to watch.

items.summary_zh: 四月快结束了。五月是值得关注的月份。

items.title_zh: 法国检察官指控 88 名与加密扳手攻击有关的个人
items.summary_zh: 法国当局敦促加密货币持有者保持警惕，避免在社交媒体上广泛曝光，以免成为攻击目标。

items.title: Luxor, MicroBT deepen ties with $100 million mining rig deal and planned investment

items.title_zh: Luxor 与 MicroBT 通过 1 亿美元的矿机交易和计划投资加深联系

items.title: 22-year-old sentenced to 70 months for money laundering tied to $263 million crypto syndicate
items.summary: The Lamborghini-laden money laundering operation was "built on greed so brazen it borders on the cartoonish," according to prosecutors.
items.title_zh: 22 岁男子因涉及 2.63 亿美元加密货币集团洗钱被判 70 个月监禁
items.summary_zh: 检察官表示，兰博基尼的洗钱活动“建立在贪婪的基础上，如此厚颜无耻，近乎卡通化”。
